fields.name: accordion_title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Enter title of each accordion item

fields.label: Title Font Size
fields.description: Select the font size for the title

fields.label: Accordion Title Style
fields.description: Select the style applied to Title for all Accordion items

fields.name: classes_layout
fields.label: Accordion Layout
fields.description: Select the dropdown option to enable full width layout or 2-column layout inside accordion; This gets applied to all accordion items
